flashcards.back:
P (wait/down/acquire):
- Decrement value
- Block if negative

V (signal/up/release):
- Increment value
- Wake waiting process

Binary: 0 or 1 (mutex)
Counting: 0 to N (resources)

Binary = Lock
Counting = Pool of N

If sem value < 0:
|value| = # waiting processes

Ex: sem = -3 means
3 processes blocked waiting
